default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on growth priorities and OKRs for the new Intent app.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Intent Downloads are the \#1 Priority:** The primary goal is driving 500 Intent downloads/day to build a community and accelerate growth.
  - [**New OKRs Set:** New targets are 500 Intent downloads/day and 50k weekly organic traffic (up from a 34k 4-week average).](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Immediate CTA Pivot:** Blog CTAs will be updated to promote Intent, starting with a quick sidebar change and followed by a more robust, component-based solution.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Code Review Trial Launching:** A new free trial for the Code Review product is launching next week to improve its "garbage" conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

## Topics

### New OKRs & Growth Strategy

  - [**Intent Downloads:** The top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Goal:** 500 downloads/day.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Build a community and accelerate growth toward a 50k user target.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Current Performance:** The Intent landing page converts at a high 18%, validating the product experience and shifting focus to top-of-funnel traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**Goal:** 50,000 weekly organic visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**Baseline:** 34,000 weekly average over the last four weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [**Code Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve the "garbage" conversion rate of Code Review content.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [**Solution:** Launch a new free trial next week (e.g., 10-20 free pull requests) to provide a stronger CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

### Intent Content & CTA Pivot

  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Focus:** Create bottom-of-funnel (BOFU) content (e.g., "alternatives" articles) to capture high-intent users.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Guidance:** Use PostTag data to identify top-performing content and replicate its success.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [**CTA Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**Problem:** Current blog CTAs promote the main product, not the new Intent app.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
      - [**Immediate Fix:** Change the sidebar CTA on relevant articles to promote "Download Intent for free."](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [**Longer-Term Solution:** Build a component-based CTA library that dynamically updates based on article tags (e.g., `product: intent`).](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [Update OKRs with the new targets: 500 Intent downloads/day and 50k weekly organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Implement the immediate sidebar CTA fix for Intent-related blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [Prioritize creating BOFU content for Intent, guided by PostTag data.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Draft a summary of weekly Intent growth activities for Sylvain's company-wide memo.](https://fathom.video/share/xqsxwKZnBhszkMByakUQj_nxjBhpG8qG?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

action_items.description: Set up PostTag reporting for Intent downloads by content; then send weekly summary to Sylvain
Send weekly Intent GrowthX update to Sylvain for Thu memo
Implement dynamic sidebar CTA (Intent vs Code Review) across blog
Tag Intent articles in Spectrum; then update sidebar CTA to Intent
